channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Utah Senate President Loses Primary After Backing Data Center
item.description: The Utah State Senate president lost his Republican primary Tuesday after supporting a large data center project in the state.

item.title: Court Blocks DOJ Request for Michigan Voter Data
item.description: A federal appeals court ruled Wednesday that Michigan does not have to release registered voters' personal information.

item.title: DOJ Threatens to Sue California Over 'Glock Ban'
item.description: The Department of Justice warned California it would sue if the state enforces its 'Glock ban,' claiming the law violates Second Amendment rights.

item.title: Democrat House Primary Result Worth a Smile
